group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The abstract states "We assigned men with metastatic, hormone-sensitive prostate cancer to receive either ADT plus docetaxel (at a dose of 75 mg per square meter of body-surface area every 3 weeks for six cycles) or ADT alone." Therefore, Treatment Arm 1 is ADT plus docetaxel. ADT is Androgen-deprivation therapy, which is a hormonal therapy. Docetaxel is a chemotherapy agent. Therefore, the Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1 is "Chemotherapy and Hormonal Therapy".
